---
title: "Sophia May Eckley"
---

## Sophia May Eckley

**Dates:** (1822-1874)

**Maiden name:** (Tuckerman)

### Description

contributor to <i>MP</i> (1868)

### Biography

She was author of devotional verse, a friend of Elizabeth Barrett Browning, a spiritualist medium and probably also the Mrs Eckley contributing to  <i>MP</i> in 1873.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
